Game.Name: Gousou Jinrai Densetsu - Musha (Japan)
Game.plot: Musya is an Action Adventure game, developed by Jorudan and published by Datam Polystar,which was released in Japan in 1992.Cheat: Level PasswordsThe Japanese version of Musya has different passwords.Cheat: Level PasswordsAs with the English version, the title screen has a choice between "Begin" (Hajimekara) and "Cont." (inue) (Tsuzukikara). Selecting continue will go to the password screen.Cheat: Level PasswordsPasswords in Musya are obtained by losing all of the lives and going to the Game Over screen, which presents a choice between "Cont." (Tsuzukeru) and "End" (Owaru). Choosing "End" reveals the password for the level in which Imoto (Jinrai in the Japanese version) died in. When the user decides to exit from that screen, he returns to the title screen.
